name: codex-os-brain
description: A public, privacy-first cognitive harness for Codex: global hooks, working context, verification gates, and a local dashboard.

scripts.check: node --check bin/codex-os-brain.mjs && node --check runtime/scripts/inject-context.cjs && node --check runtime/scripts/global-hook-status.cjs && node --check runtime/scripts/engineering-harness.cjs && node --check runtime/scripts/capture-session.cjs && node --check runtime/scripts/privacy-scan.cjs && node --check runtime/dashboard/dashboard-server.mjs && npm run privacy:scan && node test/smoke.mjs
